aliases.description: Aliases to add to the RNA sequence

annotations.description: Annotations to create on the RNA sequence.

authorIds.description: IDs of users to set as the RNA sequence's authors.

bases.description: Base pairs for the RNA sequence.

customFields.description: Custom fields to add to the RNA sequence. Every field should have its name as a key, mapping to an object with information about the value of the field.

fields.description: Fields to set on the RNA sequence. Must correspond with the schema's field definitions. Every field should have its name as a key, mapping to an object with information about the value of the field.

folderId.description: ID of the folder containing the RNA sequence.

helm.description: Representation of the RNA sequence in HELM syntax, including any chemical modifications

isCircular.description: Whether the RNA sequence is circular or linear. RNA sequences can only be linear

schemaId.description: ID of the RNA sequence's schema.

translations.description: Translations to create on the RNA sequence. Translations are specified by either a combination of 'start' and 'end' fields, or a list of regions. Both cannot be provided.
